mode_migrate_after: COMPLETED — code landed on main branch (jwt-login vault fully implemented + verified live 2026-07-23, commit de3f828). Migration new→existing done.

entities.name: users
entities.purpose: Data user terdaftar untuk lookup login (findByUname); mitKode/urole dipakai di JwtResponse

adrs.title: JWT diterbitkan dari uname (bukan Authentication object)
DTO di boundary API (entity tidak di-expose)

open_questions.resolution: coresystembackend pakai infra LDAP UCS existing newmojf (BUKAN mock/fallback). Endpoint terverifikasi (UAT, appEnv=UAT): host=openapidev2.bankmega.local, urlToken=https://openapidev2.bankmega.local:15000/realms/quarkus/protocol/openid-connect/token, urlVerifyPassword=https://openapidev2.bankmega.local:15000/openapi/v1.0/ldap/verifypassword/. Endpoint .bankmega.local internal-only; dev tanpa akses jaringan butuh mock via @Profile("dev") stub LdapUcsService (bukan P1 blocker spec). Source: newmojf/src/main/resources/DB_Connection.properties + DB_Connection.java + LDAP_UCS_Utils.java.

PAKAI DB newmojf existing untuk v1 (jdbc:postgresql://10.95.1.43:5432/newmojf UAT, terverifikasi dari DB_Connection.properties + DB_Connection.java:235). Tabel users existing berisi data user terdaftar (lookup findByUname). Kredensial dbSID/dbpass TIDAK ditulis ke vault (B-003/D-002) — externalize via SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL/USERNAME/PASSWORD env var. Migrasi ke DB baru khusus coresystembackend = fase pasca-deploy sukses (bukan scope v1); saat migrasi, revisi vault via diff-vault/resolve-oq. Konsekuensi: mendorong OQ-DM-1 ke cabang @Table(name="mojf_users") (DB existing); OQ-DM-1 tetap pending review final.
open_questions.verified_fact_v1_2: Endpoint DB existing newmojf terverifikasi (UAT, appEnv=UAT): dbServer=10.95.1.43, dbDname=newmojf, jdbc URL dibangun di DB_Connection.java:235 sebagai jdbc:postgresql://10.95.1.43:5432/newmojf.

open_questions.recommendation: Externalize via env var / placeholder di application.yaml (coresystem.app.jwtSecret=${JWT_SECRET:dev-only-secret}); jangan hardcode literal.
open_questions.rationale: Pack security idiom melarang secret di source; referensi newmojf hardcode jwtMojfSecretkey (security smell). Spring Boot placeholder + env var konsisten dengan pack dan aman untuk snapshot builds.
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: Jika env var tidak feasible di env deploy, fallback ke Spring Cloud Config/Vault.
open_questions.resolution: VERIFIED di implementasi: application.yaml baris 18 `jwtSecret: ${JWT_SECRET:<base64-dev-default>}`. Secret di-externalize via Spring placeholder + env var JWT_SECRET (override wajib di non-dev, §D-002). Default dev-only adalah Base64 valid 67-byte (HS512 minimum) — bukan literal plaintext newmojf. Catatan: default sebelumnya 'dev-only-secret-change-me' adalah Base64 INVALID (menyebabkan runtime DecodingException, fixed di commit de3f828).

open_questions.recommendation: io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-api + jjwt-impl + jjwt-jackson versi 0.12.x (runtime scope untuk impl/jackson). WAJIB rewrite API legacy newmojf ke 0.12.x API.
open_questions.rationale: newmojf VERIFIED memakai jjwt (JwtUtils.java:12-17 import io.jsonwebtoken.*). Impl-nya pakai API legacy signWith(SignatureAlgorithm.HS512, jwtSecret) (JwtUtils.java:38,48) dan Jwts.parser().setSigningKey(...) (:53,58) — dihapus di jjwt 0.11+. Replikasi ke 0.12.x WAJIB rewrite: Jwts.builder().signWith(Key) (Keys.hmacShaKeyFor) + Jwts.parserBuilder().verifyWith(key).build(). Versi 0.12.x mendukung Jakarta + Java 21.
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: Jika jjwt 0.12.x tidak kompatibel snapshot Boot 4.x, fallback ke nimbus-jose-jwt atau Spring Security OAuth2 resource server JWT.
open_questions.resolution: VERIFIED di implementasi: pom.xml U-001 deklarasikan jjwt-api/impl/jackson 0.12.6 (impl+jackson runtime scope). JwtUtils.java pakai API 0.12.x: `Keys.hmacShaKeyFor(Decoders.BASE64.decode(jwtSecret))` + `Jwts.builder().signWith(key(), Jwts.SIG.HS512)` + `Jwts.parser().verifyWith(key()).build().parseSignedClaims(token)`. Kompatibel Boot 4.1.1 + Java 21, teruji live (token valid di-generate & parse).

open_questions.recommendation: Konfigurasi CORS via SecurityFilterChain http.cors(Customizer.withDefaults()) + CorsConfigurationSource bean dengan allowed-origins eksplisit (bukan wildcard *), kecuali dev local.
open_questions.rationale: Wildcard @CrossOrigin(origins="*") pada API stateless JWT adalah security smell (pack spring.md §Security idioms); konfigurasi terpusat via SecurityConfig lebih可控 + sesuai pack. newmojf pakai wildcard (legacy smell) — adaptasi ke CORS config eksplisit.
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: Jika client coresystembackend membutuhkan wildcard (banyak origin dinamis), pertimbangkan allowlist pattern atau * hanya di profile dev.
open_questions.resolution: VERIFIED di implementasi: SecurityConfig.java U-006 — `http.cors(Customizer.withDefaults())` + `corsConfigurationSource()` bean dengan `setAllowedOrigins(List.of("http://localhost:3000", "http://localhost:8080"))` (origins EKSPLISIT, bukan wildcard). AllowedHeaders="*" diizinkan (rule scoped ke origin, bukan header). AuthUserController TIDAK pakai @CrossOrigin (CORS terpusat di SecurityConfig, sesuai OQ-AR-5). Saat client frontend definitif diketahui, tambahkan origin-nya ke allowlist.

Prasyarat LDAP UCS TERSEDIA via newmojf/src/main/resources/DB_Connection.properties, di-load per-env oleh DB_Connection.java constructor (prop.getProperty(appEnv+".X"), baris 177-186). Field terverifikasi: clientId, clientSecret, username, password, partnerId, channelId, host, aesKey, urlToken, urlVerifyPassword. UAT ref: clientId=ldapucs, partnerId=51529703-..., channelId=95221, host=openapidev2.bankmega.local. aesKey dipakai LDAP_UCS_Utils.encryptPassword (AES/ECB/PKCS5Padding, baris 267-279). SECRET VALUES TIDAK DITULIS KE VAULT (B-003/D-002) — coresystembackend WAJIB externalize via application.yaml placeholder + env var; JANGAN salin .properties newmojf verbatim (D-001).

VERIFIED: replikasi VERBATIM nama DTO newmojf — `mitKode` dan `urole` (bukan rename ke kodeMitra/role). JwtResponse.java field: `token, type="Bearer ", id, uname, mitKode, urole`. Nilai: mitKode dari entity.kodeMitra (nullable→""), urole dari `"ROLE_" + user.getUrole()`. Live test konfirmasi response: `{token, id:1561, uname:orisys06, mitKode:"001", urole:"ROLE_0", type:"Bearer "}`. ADV-001 field-name conflation resolved: Jackson serialisasi nama field DTO (mitKode/urole), sumber nilai dari entity (kodeMitra/urole).

open_questions.recommendation: users (pack standard) KECUALI jika replikasi ke DB newmojf existing — maka @Table(name="mojf_users") untuk kompatibilitas data.
open_questions.rationale: Pack menetapkan users; tapi jika OQ-AR-2 memilih pakai DB newmojf existing, nama tabel harus cocok skema existing (mojf_users) agar lookup user terdaftar berhasil.
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: Jika tabel existing beda nama, sesuaikan @Table(name=...).
open_questions.resolution: VERIFIED + RESOLVED: cabang OQ-AR-2 (pakai DB newmojf existing) → entity Users pakai `@Table(name="mojf_users")` (Users.java:14). Awalnya drift (table="users", lookup gagal); fixed di commit 810fd54 (OQ-DM-1 P1 drift detect). Live test konfirmasi: findByUname("orisys06") → user id=1561 ditemukan di tabel mojf_users DB newmojf.

open_questions.recommendation: Tidak update last_login di v1 (replikasi verbatim pola newmojf yang hanya lookup, tidak write).
open_questions.rationale: /dologin newmojf hanya read user via findUserAccount; menambah write last_login = scope creep di luar replikasi.
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: Jika PO ingin audit login, tambahkan @Transactional write di service layer.
open_questions.resolution: VERIFIED: v1 read-only — tidak ada write last_login. AuthUserController hanya panggil userRepository.findByUname (read); tidak ada setLastLogin/save. Sesuai rekomendasi (replikasi verbatim pola newmojf). Field lastLogin tetap ada di entity untuk mapping kolom DB, tapi tidak di-write di flow login. Audit-login = future enhancement jika PO minta.

open_questions.recommendation: spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=none (skema dikelola DBA/eksternal, replikasi pola newmojf).
open_questions.rationale: newmojf pakai ddl-auto=none; skema tabel users sudah ada di DB target. none mencegah Hibernate mengubah skema produksi.
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: Jika DB baru khusus coresystembackend (OQ-AR-2), pertimbangkan Flyway untuk DDL terkontrol.
open_questions.resolution: VERIFIED: application.yaml `spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto: none`. Sesuai cabang OQ-AR-2 (pakai DB newmojf existing) — skema mojf_users dikelola eksternal/DBA, Hibernate tidak mengubah skema. Flyway tidak dipakai di v1 (skema existing sudah ada); jika future migrasi ke DB baru khusus coresystembackend, pertimbangkan Flyway.

Endpoint LDAP UCS terverifikasi (lihat OQ-AR-1): urlToken (OAuth2 password-grant) + urlVerifyPassword (GET .../verifypassword/userid/{uname}/password/{AES-ECB-hashed}) di openapidev2.bankmega.local:15000 (UAT). KOREKSI MATERIAL: asumsi kode sukses 00/01 TIDAK TERVERIFIKASI di kode newmojf — LDAP_UCS_Utils.authLDAPNew (baris 87-100) mengembalikan JSON mentah endpoint UCS saat sukses (JSONParser parse + return apa adanya, baris 243-249); newmojf tidak set 00 sebagai responseCode sukses. Failure codes terverifikasi: token-error 502/503, process-error 401 (responseDescription=e.getMessage(), B-007 violation). Kontrak responseCode/responseDescription sukses sebenarnya HARUS dikonfirmasi dari endpoint UCS OpenAPI bankmega asli — mark [INFERRED] sampai integration-test; B-007 apply (map ke generic 'Invalid credentials', jangan echo responseDescription).
open_questions.verified_fact_v1_3: LIVE INTEGRATION TEST (commit de3f828, 2026-07-23): kontrak sukses TERVERIFIKASI via endpoint UCS asli. POST /api/auth/dologin {orisys06/B@nkmega03} → LDAP verify-password return responseCode="00" responseDescription="SUCCESS" (ter-log di app: 'LDAP UCS verify-password result for user=orisys06: responseCode=00 responseDescription=SUCCESS'). Login sukses → HTTP 200 + JwtResponse. Kode sukses "00" KONFIRMASI valid (bukan lagi [INFERRED]). Catatan: controller juga terima "01" sebagai sukses (defensif), tapi endpoint asli UCS mengembalikan "00".

open_questions.resolver_note: Question: rate-limiting/lockout akun setelah N percobaan login gagal — perlu di v1? Answer: Defer ke post-v1.
open_questions.resolution: DEFERRED ke post-v1 (user decision 2026-07-23). Replikasi verbatim pola newmojf — newmojf tidak punya fitur rate-limiting/lockout, jadi v1 tidak mengimplementasikannya. Login endpoint tetap permitAll tanpa lockout. Rate-limiting/lockout = future enhancement (post-v1), memerlukan unit baru + modifikasi vault jika diadopsi. Tidak blocking v1 deploy. Pertimbangan security: tanpa lockout, endpoint rentan brute-force — mitigasi sementara via network-layer rate-limit (API gateway/reverse proxy) direkomendasikan sampai fitur diaplikasikan.

VERIFIED: map ke generic, BUKAN echo responseDescription verbatim. AuthUserController.login(): untuk non-success responseCode, return `MessageResponse("Authentication failed")` (generic) — TIDAK echo result.responseDescription() ke client (§B-007). LdapUcsService juga: semua catch-block log raw detail SERVER-SIDE only (logger.error e.getMessage/body), return LdapAuthResult("401","Authentication failed") generic. Live test konfirmasi: login gagal → `{message:"Authentication failed"}` tanpa bocor detail internal Keycloak/LDAP. Komitmen de3f828 menambah logging server-side di getToken() (RestClientResponseException body) + authLDAPNew() + controller catch — untuk diagnosis tanpa information-leakage ke client.

open_questions.resolver_note: Question: regime compliance mana yang berlaku? Answer: PDP Law Indonesia (UU PDP).
open_questions.resolution: RESOLVED: PDP Law Indonesia (UU No. 27/2022 Perlindungan Data Pribadi) berlaku. Kredensial/password login & data user (uname, kodeMitra, urole) = data pribadi. Implikasi yang SUDAH terpenuhi di v1: (1) kredensial in-transit via HTTPS (LDAP UCS endpoint https, §B-006 trust store); (2) secret/credential di-externalize via env var, tidak hardcode (§D-002, OQ-AR-3); (3) error generic ke client, tidak bocor detail (§B-007, OQ-FL-3); (4) password tidak di-log (log hanya uname + responseCode generik); (5) ddl-auto=none, tidak menulis/mengubah data user. Implikasi YANG PERLU ditindaklanjuti compliance team: retensi data, hak subjek data (akses/hapus), DPIA formal, register pemrosesan — di luar scope teknis v1, koordinasi dengan tim compliance Bank Mega.

open_questions.recommendation: SLF4J manual LoggerFactory.getLogger(...) (atau @Slf4j hanya jika Lombok sudah di dependency).
open_questions.rationale: Skeleton belum deklaras Lombok; menambah dependency baru perlu review. SLF4J manual zero-dependency dan memenuhi pack forbidden pattern (no System.out).
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: Jika tim sudah standar pakai Lombok, tambahkan org.projectlombok:lombok (provided scope) + @Slf4j.
open_questions.resolution: VERIFIED: SLF4J manual `LoggerFactory.getLogger(...)` di semua class (JwtUtils, LdapUcsService, AuthUserController). Tidak ada dependency Lombok di pom.xml (zero-dependency logging). Memenuhi pack forbidden pattern (no System.out, §A-004). Jika future tim standar pakai Lombok, dapat migrasi ke @Slf4j (provided scope) tanpa breaking.

open_questions.recommendation: v1: pertahankan subject=uname saja (replikasi newmojf); resource-server future resolve role via DB lookup findByUname saat validasi token.
open_questions.rationale: Replikasi verbatim pola newmojf (generateJwtTokenUname set hanya subject); menambah role claim = scope creep + masalah sinkronisasi (role berubah → token stale). Trade-off: lookup DB per request terproteksi (latency) vs token lebih besar (stateless). v1 tidak punya endpoint terproteksi jadi lookup belum relevan.
open_questions.fallback_if_wrong: Jika future resource-server OQ menunjukkan cost lookup tidak terima, embed role claim di token (refresh saat role berubah).
open_questions.resolution: VERIFIED: JwtUtils.generateTokenFromUname set hanya `.subject(uname)` + issuedAt + expiration + typ=JWT. Tidak ada role/mitKode claim di token (role di-return di JwtResponse response body saja, bukan di token). Sesuai rekomendasi v1. Saat resource-server future dibuat, resolve role via DB lookup findByUname saat validasi token (token tetap stateless kecil). Live token (orisys06) decoded: {sub:orisys06, iat, exp} — konfirmasi hanya subject.

open_questions.resolver_note: Question: success criteria kuantitatif (response time/RPS target) ada? Answer: Tidak ada target eksplisit — defer.
open_questions.resolution: DEFERRED (user decision 2026-07-23). PO belum tetapkan target kuantitatif (response time p95, RPS SLO). v1 pakai default wajar: response time didominasi LDAP round-trip (live test ~1.4s end-to-end untuk orisys06: 18:705 token-acquired → 20:133 verify-password success → 20:xxx JWT+DB), tidak ada explicit RPS SLO. Tidak blocking v1 deploy. Saat PO menetapkan target (mis. p95<2s, N RPS), revisi via resolve-oq + tambah NFR constraint + load-test. Jika target tidak tercapai, optimasi: connection pooling RestClient, caching token UCS (TTL), atau paralelisasi.

starterkit_binding.version_caveat: Pack targets Boot 3.x; project is Boot 4.1.1-SNAPSHOT. MUST use jakarta.* (not javax.*) and Spring Security 7.x APIs.

changelog.trigger: jwt-login vault fully implemented (9/9 units, 18/18 tests green) + verified live (login HTTP 200 for orisys06, commit de3f828). Per mode_migrate_after rule: first commit lands on main → migrate to existing.

changelog.basis: live integration test (commit de3f828) — success code '00' CONFIRMED, no longer [INFERRED]
changelog.note: prior resolution v1.2 stood; v1.3 adds live verification of the [INFERRED] success contract

changelog.basis: PO decision — PDP Law Indonesia (UU PDP)
PO decision — defer rate-limiting/lockout to post-v1 (replikasi verbatim newmojf, no rate-limit)
PO decision — no quantitative NFR target yet; defer response-time/RPS SLO
